name: vortos/vortos-analytics
description: Vortos product-analytics port — capture/identify/group, null default in-core, privacy-by-default (deny-all consent + allowlist + PII redaction), bounded batching + idempotent identify/group, and an opt-in sampled flag-exposure bridge. Provider drivers (PostHog, ...) ship as separate split packages.

suggest.vortos/vortos-feature-flags: Optional: closes FEATURE_FLAGS_PLATFORM.md §9 by bridging accepted flag exposures into an agnostic feature_flag_exposure analytics event (opt-in, sampled). Guarded by interface_exists().
suggest.vortos/vortos-deploy: Optional: registers an analytics:doctor-style preflight check. Guarded by interface_exists().
suggest.vortos/vortos-analytics-posthog: The PostHog server-side driver — a separate split package, never required by core.
